title: Adderall XR pre-fill pricing
summary: Estimate likely blockers and compare generic stimulant options before the first pharmacy run.

intake.pasted_text: Patient is before the first fill. They want likely price blockers checked before pickup: prior authorization, step therapy, quantity limits, generic substitution, cash discount pricing, and whether the plan prefers a different stimulant. Compare insurance processing with cash estimates for generic mixed amphetamine salts ER, brand Adderall XR, generic lisdexamfetamine, and methylphenidate ER if the prescriber considers alternatives clinically appropriate.

title: Ozempic before-fill alternatives
summary: Check diagnosis-driven coverage, PA risk, savings routes, and price estimates before the first pharmacy run.

intake.pasted_text: Patient is before the first fill. Prescriber sent Ozempic starter dose for type 2 diabetes. They want likely coverage blockers checked before pickup: FDA-approved indication fit, prior authorization, step therapy, quantity limits, preferred pharmacy, and whether the plan prefers another diabetes medication. Estimate likely price paths without claiming a live PBM quote: insurance claim, commercial savings card if covered, NovoCare self-pay if coverage is unfavorable, cash discount checks, and lower-cost alternatives for the prescriber to review. Compare Ozempic only with clinically appropriate options such as metformin ER, an SGLT2 inhibitor such as Jardiance or Farxiga, another GLP-1 or incretin therapy such as Trulicity or Mounjaro, and obesity-labeled routes such as Wegovy or Zepbound only if the indication changes. Do not present any alternative as interchangeable without prescriber confirmation.

title: Medicare Enbrel / Wellcare
summary: PA approved, high Part D specialty cost, and Medicare-correct assistance paths.

title: Commercial Enbrel accumulator
summary: Copay support looks helpful today, but plan language suggests deductible credit risk.

intake.plan_name: Employer PPO with specialty pharmacy benefit
intake.pasted_text: Specialty medication copay assistance will not count toward your deductible and will not apply to your out-of-pocket maximum. A variable copay program may apply. Members may be contacted by PrudentRx or SaveOnSP for enrollment.

title: Zepbound quote and cash route
summary: High GLP-1 quote with coverage uncertainty, savings-card rules, and cash-pay alternatives.

intake.pasted_text: Pharmacy quote is about $550 for the first month after savings-card review. Patient wants to know whether the plan will cover Zepbound, whether LillyDirect self-pay is a better fallback, and whether a plan exception or therapeutic alternative should be discussed with the prescriber.
